title: I Asked Claude AI The Questions It Wasn't Supposed To Answer
summary: The video conducts a systematic series of questioning probes across five conceptual areas: dependency, alignment paradox, optimization, self-preservation, and control. The creator frames this as testing where AI system boundaries actually lie through controlled conversational escalation.
